news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches AVXX: The First 2X Long ETF for AeroVironment Inc.

holdings.infoBox: AVXX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 85.81%, AEROVIRONMENT INC.-SWAP-NBCB-L at 41.80%, AEROVIRONMENT INC COM SWAP CAN at 38.12%, AEROVIRONMENT INC SWAP CS at 37.28%, and AEROVIRONMENT SWAP NOMURA-L at 34.59%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Long AVAV ETF (AVXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of AeroVironment Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAV), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements AVXX was launched on Oct 23, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
